title: Scythes
description: This mod adds scythes and 2 additional enchantments to Minecraft.
body:
Scythes is a mod from a new line of mods called "Combat Revamp".

Scythes adds a new weapon, a scythe and 2 new enchantments, exclusive to the scythe.

The Scythe can be made from every Vanilla material in the game. (from wood to netherite)

The enchantments are: 
 - Hook: pulls the victim closer to the attacker.
 - Dash: Dashes the player upon right clicking.
